title: phlox douglasii var. austromontana
intro: Phlox douglasii var. austromontana, also known as the purple phlox or mountain phlox, is a variety of flowering plant native to the mountains of western North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phlox douglasii var. austromontana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Phlox douglasii var. austromontana include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
